summaryAm: አንድ ግዙፍ አትክልቱን ከልጆች ጋር ሲያጋራ ልቡ የሚለሰልስበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ቦታን ስናጋራ ደስታ እና አበባ ይበቅላሉ።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አንድ ግዙፍ በትልቅ አትክልት ያለው ቤት ይኖር ነበር። አትክልቱ በአበቦች፣ በዛፎች እና በወፎች ድምፅ የተሞላ ነበር።
pages.textEn: A giant lived beside a beautiful garden.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle-looking giant near a large beautiful garden full of flowers.

pages.textAm: ልጆች ከትምህርት በኋላ በአትክልቱ ዳር ይቆሙ ነበር። አበቦቹን ሲያዩ ዓይኖቻቸው በደስታ ይበሩ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Children looked at the garden with joy.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children looking kindly at flowers outside a garden gate.

pages.textAm: ግዙፉ ግን ‘ይህ አትክልት ለእኔ ብቻ ነው’ ብሎ በሩን ዘጋ። አትክልቱም በቀስታ ጸጥ መሆን ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: The giant closed the gate, and the garden grew quiet.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The giant closing a garden gate while the garden becomes quiet, not scary.

pages.textAm: ቀናት ሲያልፉ ወፎች አልዘመሩም፣ አበቦችም አልተከፈቱም። ግዙፉ ብቻውን ተቀምጦ ‘ለምን እንዲህ ጸጥ አለ?’ ብሎ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: As days passed, the birds did not sing and the flowers did not open, so the giant wondered why.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The giant sitting alone in a quiet garden, thoughtful and gentle.

pages.textAm: አንድ ጠዋት ከበሩ ውጭ ልጆች በቀስታ ሲስቁ ሰማ። ድምፃቸው እንደ ትንሽ ወፍ ዘፈን ወደ ልቡ ገባ።
pages.textEn: One morning he heard children laughing softly outside.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The giant hearing children laughing softly outside the garden gate.

pages.textAm: ግዙፉ በመስኮት ተመለከተ። ልጆች አበቦቹን ሳይነኩ በናፍቆት ይመለከቱ ነበር።
pages.textEn: He saw children looking lovingly at the flowers.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children admiring flowers from outside while the giant watches from a window.

pages.textAm: ‘ደስታ ሲካፈል ነው የሚበቅለው’ ብሎ ግዙፉ ተረዳ። በሩን ከፈተና ‘እባካችሁ በጥንቃቄ ግቡ’ አለ።
pages.textEn: The giant opened the gate and invited the children in kindly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The giant opening the garden gate kindly for children.

pages.textAm: ልጆቹ በአትክልቱ ውስጥ በቀስታ ተጓዙ። አንዱ ዛፍ ሥር ተቀመጠ፣ ሌላውም ወፎችን ተመለከተ።
pages.textEn: The children entered carefully and enjoyed the garden.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children walking carefully through the giant's garden with flowers and birds.

pages.textAm: በጥቂት ጊዜ አበቦች ተከፈቱ፣ ወፎችም ዘመሩ። ግዙፉ በፈገግታ ውሃ አመጣና ልጆቹን አገዘ።
pages.textEn: Flowers opened and birds sang as the giant helped.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The giant watering flowers while children play gently in the garden.

pages.textAm: ግዙፉ ከልጆቹ ጋር በአበቦች መካከል ተቀመጠ። አንዱ ቢራቢሮ አሳየው፣ ሌላውም የወፎችን ዘፈን በደስታ አዳመጠ።
pages.textEn: The giant sat among the flowers with the children and listened happily.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The giant and children enjoying a blooming shared garden together.

pages.textAm: ዝናብ ሲወርድ ግዙፉ ትልቅ ቅጠል እንደ ጃንጥላ ይይዝላቸው ነበር። ፀሐይ ሲወጣም ሁሉም አበቦችን አጠጡ።
pages.textEn: In rain and sunshine, the giant and children cared for the garden together.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle giant holding a large leaf like an umbrella for children in a garden rain.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ አትክልቱ ለሁሉም የደስታ ቦታ ሆነ። ግዙፉም ቦታን ሲካፈል ልብ እንደሚሞቅ፣ ደስታም እንደ አበባ እንደሚበቅል ተማረ።
pages.textEn: The garden became a shared place of joy, and the giant learned to share his heart.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The gentle giant and children in a blooming shared garden full of flowers and warm light.
